description: A state of being good, healthy, or satisfactory; wellness in its fullness. 'Towe' names the good state—when things are as they should be.
sound_symbolism: The word flows with wellness. 'To' touches with grounded stability, foundation sound. 'We' flows with gentle goodness, wellness spreading.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo towe' (the wellness). As adjective: 'towe miona' (well person). Related to 'sunai' (health) as state to condition.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Wellbeing for all—communities organized around collective flourishing.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Well-being as balance—the state arising from harmony of body, mind, and community.
